emails.subject: Harvard Business School case studies
emails.body: Harvard Business School case studies Beth, I have a favor to ask. Do we have copies of Harvard Business School case studies about Enron? We use these case studies during Super Saturdays. I need a few copies. This is for Prof. John Martin. Vince

emails.body: Beth, Thanks. Dhabol is one. There should be 2 more case studies we used. One about old EGS, the 2nd about TVA options. 2-3 copies will be sufficient. Vince From: Beth Miertschin 07/31/2000 03:44 PM
